nasb.text: There will be two women grinding at the same place; one will be taken and the other will be left.

esv.text: There will be two women grinding together. One will be taken and the other left.”

cnv.text: 兩個女人一起推磨，一個被接去，一個被撇下。”

ccb.text: 两个女人一起推磨，一个将被接去，一个将被撇下；

csbs.text: 两个女人在一起推磨，一个会被接去，另一个会被留下。”
